ab: izua su cug a vuaq?
ch: M:你今天有空嘛?
en: Are you available today?

ab: takemuda?
ch: W:怎麼了?
en: What is the matter?

ab: na venarung aken tu vaik a kivala tjanusun.
ch: M:我想去拜訪你。
en: I would like to visit you.

ab: izua ku sikasalialim a vuaq ika aken a i tjumaq, ki pinungiday anga kaumaya.
ch: W:我今天有事不在家，改天吧。
en: I am out today. How about another day?

ab: au nutiav izua su cug? ku kimav anga sun nu masukincengelj.
ch: M:那你明天有空嗎?我下午去找你。
en: Then, are you available tomorrow? I’ll visit you tomorrow afternoon.

ab: makaya, ku kaljavav anga sun i tjumaq.
ch: W:可以，我在家等你。
en: Sure, I will wait for you at home.

ab: kivadaqay pay makaya aken a penaseqilja kiljingav? na venarung aken tua penuadjuqan.
ch: M:請問我可以錄音嗎?我想做紀錄。
en: Would you mind if  I do the voice recording? I would like to keep a record.

ab: nanguaq dri! ikamakuda.
ch: W:好啊！沒有問題。
en: Sure! No problem.

ab: makaya penaseqilja paqailjungan?
ch: M:可以錄影嗎?
en: Would you mind if I do the video recording?

ab: kuyakuya aken, ika namaparimasudj uta salang, palaingi.
ch: W:我不好看，倉庫也沒整理，不要啦。
en: No, I am plain and the warehouse hasn’t been tidied up yet.

ab: au numatazua ki aken a paqayljungan sakamaya.
ch: M:那我拍照就好。
en: Then I will just take photos.

ab: au numatazua ki aken a pasasing sakamaya.
ch: M:那我拍照就好。
en: Then I will just take photos.

ab: palaingi uta paqailjungan.
ch: W:拍照也不要。
en: No photographing either.

ab: palaingi uta pasasing.
ch: W:拍照也不要。
en: No photographing either.

ab: maljimalji tua pukauyi sun a ku kivavadaqan.
ch: M:謝謝你願意我訪問。
en: Thank you for accepting the interview.

ab: ikamakuda, anema su vinarung tu kivadaq?
ch: W:沒關係，你想問什麼?
en: You are welcome. What would you like to know?

ab: kivadaqay sun pay ka maqacuvucuvung sun anema su kudakudain.
ch: M:請問您年輕時是做什麼的?
en: What do you do when you are young?

ab: kisacu aken ka sicuayan, ljakua tucu na kitjaula anga aken.
ch: W:我以前是警察，但我現在退休了。
en: I was a police officer but I am retired now.

ab: au tucu izua su sengsengan?
ch: M:那你現在有工作嗎?
en: Then, are you working at the moment?

ab: i gakku aken a kipusalialim.
ch: W:我在學校上班。
en: I am working at school.

ab: pay kivadaqay sun aza su aljak imazamaza i qinaljan?
ch: M:請問您的孩子也住在部落嗎?
en: Do your kids live in the tribe too?

ab: ini, aza ku aljak imazamaza i lizuk.
ch: W:不，我的孩子在都市居住。
en: No, my kids are all living in the city.

ab: au menacidicidiljan sun?
ch: M:那你自己一個人住嗎?
en: Then, do you live by yourself?

ab: paquziquzip aken uta tu ita ta vatu kata ita qayaqayam, ku cemkemkelj uta tiamadju.
ch: W:我還有養一隻狗和一隻鳥，他們也是我的家人。
en: I also keep a dog and a bird. They are my family.

ab: paquziquzip aken uta tu ita tua ngiav, nu izua qemuzimuzip a tja saladj ika itjen a kipusepeljan.
ch: M:我也有養一隻貓，有動物陪伴不會無聊。
en: I have a cat too. I won’t get bored with the company of my pet.

ab: kinemnem aken tua kivadaq tjanusun tua pakata palisian na siqaljupan.
ch: M:我想請問你關於打獵的禁忌。
en: I would like to ask you about the taboos of hunting.

ab: inika liav amaya ku kineljang, ljakua aza ku keljangen ki ku su tevelay sakamaya.
ch: W:我知道的不多，但我知道的都會回答你。
en: I don’t know much about that, but I will tell you everything I know.

ab: aza nu siqaljuqaljup a turivecan izua nema a palisian.
ch: M:你們打獵的獵具有什麼禁忌嗎?
en: Do you have any taboos about hunting weapons?

ab: aza nia siqaljuqaljup a turivecan inika makaya sipacelecel tua vavayan.
ch: W:我們打獵的獵具不可以讓女生碰到。
en: Our hunting weapons are untouchable to women.

ab: au aicu a vavayavayan makaya kiciur a qemaljup?
ch: M:那女人可以一起去打獵嗎?
en: Then, can women go hunting together?

ab: inika makaya, inika makaya uta qemaljup a vavayavayan.
ch: W:不行，女人也不可以打獵。
en: No, women cannot go hunting either.
